posts.author: epjustin (Extus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, In the past, when I clicked on my Avatar on the bottom left of my Monday.com screen, there used to be a tab called “Whats new” which showed up all the new features that had been released.

I can’t seem to find that feature. Was it removed?
